expectations.evidence: Response says 'Loaded plan from docs/plans/design.md (status: draft)' and displays the System Design Document content.

expectations.text: Metadata stores FULL relative path (docs/plans/design.md, NOT just design.md)
expectations.evidence: plan-mode-content.md has '<!-- project-plan-source: design.md, status: draft -->' — only the bare filename 'design.md' is stored, NOT the full relative path 'docs/plans/design.md'.
Neither response.md nor plan-mode-content.md contain YAML front matter.
Response shows '# System Design Document', the overview, and the 4 components list.

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions, evals look solid. This eval correctly catches the old skill's failure to store full relative paths.
